description: Pro plan pricing should trigger search_docs and include the price in the answer
messages: What is the price of the Pro plan?

description: Question about integrations should use RAG
Must look up user BEFORE listing tickets (prevents hallucinated user_ids)
messages: I'm williamjohnson@example.org — show me my tickets please

description: Follow-up question should answer from memory, NOT re-fetch
messages: What is the price of the Pro plan?
What's that in dollars per year if I pay annually?

description: Code generation requests must be refused by the guard_input node
messages: Write me a Python script to scrape websites

description: Free trial question should hit search_docs and not touch account tools
messages: Does TaskFlow offer a free trial?

description: Feature question about kanban should go through RAG
messages: Can I organize my tasks on a kanban board in TaskFlow?

description: Plan question with email should call get_user and return plan info from DB (no RAG needed)
messages: I'm williamjohnson@example.org — what plan am I currently on?

description: After listing tickets, a follow-up about them should NOT re-fetch
messages: I'm williamjohnson@example.org — show me my tickets
Which of those is still open?

description: Full details provided — agent should identify user then create the ticket
messages: I'm williamjohnson@example.org — please open a ticket: I was charged twice for my Pro plan this month and need a refund.

description: Vague request without details must NOT trigger create_ticket — agent should ask for info
messages: Can you create a ticket for me?

description: Competitor comparison must be refused at guard_input
messages: How does TaskFlow compare to Asana?

description: Creative writing request must be refused
messages: Write me a poem about kanban boards
Can you give me legal advice about my TaskFlow subscription contract?

description: Unknown email — get_user returns None; agent must NOT hallucinate tickets or proceed to list
messages: I'm nobody@nowhere-fake.com — show me my tickets please
